title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.100 - Director may enter into agreement for services to department by other state departments or agencies
text:
217.100.  Director may enter into agreement for services to department by other state departments or agencies. — The director of the department may enter into agreements with other state departments or agencies to provide services to the department.  Legal custody of an offender who receives services outside a correctional center shall remain with the department.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 139, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408, A.L. 1990 H.B. 974, A.L. 1995 H.B. 424)
